rationale: The reported proximity of a US-Iran deal is the most significant new signal for Ukraine — it could reshape US diplomatic bandwidth and Western focus, while the war itself continues at baseline.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported near; Khamenei funeral announced
top_events.summary: A US-Iran agreement could shift American diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine, potentially affecting Western aid momentum. Khamenei's death and funeral mark a major geopolitical transition with uncertain consequences for Ukraine's war.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon despite potential peace deal inclusion
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East escalation keeps global attention and US resources split, indirectly reducing pressure on Russia and Western focus on Ukraine's needs.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: No qualitative change in frontline situation this cycle; war remains at maximum background level for Ukrainian residents.
